title: html
desc:
Comprehensive Web Architecture:

  • ✅ Document Structure: Understanding the anatomy of an HTML5 document and DOCTYPE declarations.
  • ✅ Semantic HTML: Proper use of <header>, <main>, <section>, and <footer> for better accessibility and SEO.
  • ✅ Forms & Validations: Creating interactive user inputs, dropdowns, and client-side form validation techniques.
  • ✅ Multimedia Integration: Embedding images, audio, and video elements with responsive attributes.
  • ✅ Hyperlinks & Navigation: Mastering internal and external linking strategies for seamless user journeys.
  • ✅ SEO Best Practices: Utilizing Meta tags, Alt text, and heading hierarchies to rank better on Search Engines.

🏗️ Build the Skeleton of the Web:

HTML (HyperText Markup Language) holo internet-er bhasha. Ei module-e amra shudhu tag likha shikhbo na, amra shikhbo kivabe ekti website-er backbone emonbhabe toiri korte hoy jate ta manush ebong search engine—ubhoyer kachei sposto hoy. Protiti tag-er pechone ekti uddeshyo thake, ebong amra shei structural logic-ti master korbo.

💡 Daily Tip: Code lekhar somoy 'Meaningful Tags' bebohar koro. <div> er boddole proyojon moto Semantic tags bebohar korle website aro beshi professional hoy.

"A strong building needs a solid foundation. Similarly, a great developer is defined by how well they understand the core basics of HTML."
